display.purpose: Main word headings for high-impact presence.

motion.name: spring-bouncy
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions for buttons and card lifts.

components.name: Word Card
components.description: The primary entry for dictionary results, featuring a glass effect and responsive bloom.
components.html:
bikol noun

The language spoken in the Bicol region.
components.css: .ds-word-card { background: rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-word-card:hover { border-color: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3); background: rgba(39, 39, 42, 0.5); transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1); } .ds-word-title { color: #3b82f6; font-family: 'Clash Display', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; } .ds-word-pos { font-size: 0.625rem; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; color: #a1a1aa; background: #27272a; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; margin-left: 8px; } .ds-word-def { color: #fafafa; margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Rounded, approachable CTA with spring-based motion.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3b82f6; color: #fafafa; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 16px; font-weight: 600; border: none; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2563eb; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

narrative.overview: A dual-natured interface balancing Academic Authority with Community Warmth. Data is archived with precision; chrome is alive with motion.

rules.name: The Resting Precision Rule
rules.body: Surfaces at rest must use 1px borders and background shifts. Shadows are prohibited until interaction.

rules.name: The Semantic Contrast Rule
rules.body: Ensure clear weight contrast between Lemma (Bold) and Definition (Regular).

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Cards and buttons appear flat until interacted with to maintain academic structure.
